title: rbac — permissions
description: The RBAC module's OWN permission surface (permissions ABOUT roles + permissions). Split by guard. Tenant-plane permissions (guard: sanctum) gate the tenant CRUD surface — owner + admin can manage custom roles + their permissions. Platform-plane permissions (guard: platform_admin) gate the system role catalogue + role_definitions metadata layer. NEVER cross the guard boundary.

permissions.name: roles.viewAny.tenant
permissions.description: List roles for the current tenant. Returns system + custom roles applicable to the tenant.

permissions.name: roles.view.tenant
permissions.description: Show one role. Includes the permission list attached to it.

permissions.name: roles.create.tenant
permissions.description: Create a NEW custom role. Requires custom_roles entitlement + custom_role_slot quota. Refused when the tenant is on Small tier.

permissions.name: roles.update.tenant
permissions.description: Update a custom role (name, description, sort_order). System roles refuse mutation.

permissions.name: roles.delete.tenant
permissions.description: Soft-delete a custom role. Refused when the role has active assignments.

permissions.name: roles.manage.tenant
permissions.description: Composite: create + update + delete on custom roles + attach/detach permissions to any tenant-scoped role. The natural gate on the admin console's role-management surface.

permissions.name: permissions.viewAny.tenant
permissions.description: List permissions. Read-only for tenant admins — they see what perms exist in the catalogue.

permissions.name: permissions.view.tenant
permissions.description: Show one permission with its metadata.

permissions.name: permissions.create.tenant
permissions.description: Create a NEW custom permission (not just attach an existing one). Enterprise-only — requires custom_permissions entitlement.

permissions.name: principals.viewAny.tenant
permissions.description: List every principal (User) with active role assignments in the tenant. Feeds the admin console's 'who has what' report.

permissions.name: principals.roles.viewAny.tenant
permissions.description: List the roles + permissions held by any principal in the tenant.

permissions.name: principals.roles.viewAny.own
permissions.description: List the caller's own roles + permissions. Backs GET /me/roles + GET /me/permissions.

permissions.name: principals.roles.assign.tenant
permissions.description: Assign a role to a principal in the tenant. Subject to the role_assignable_by_actor rule (no privilege escalation).

permissions.name: principals.roles.revoke.tenant
permissions.description: Revoke a role assignment. Cannot revoke roles that the actor doesn't themselves hold (no privilege escalation).

permissions.name: principals.roles.assign.bulk.tenant
permissions.description: CSV bulk-assign endpoint. Requires bulk_role_assignment entitlement.

permissions.name: platform.rbac.system_roles.viewAny
permissions.description: List every system role across every Application. Platform ops + product view.

permissions.name: platform.rbac.system_roles.create
permissions.description: Create a new system role — rare platform update. Fires TenantDefaultRolesSeeded on next tenant provisioning.

permissions.name: platform.rbac.system_roles.delete
permissions.description: Archive a system role (soft-delete). Refused when any tenant has active assignments unless --force + explicit reason.

permissions.name: platform.rbac.role_definitions.create
permissions.description: Create a new role_definitions row — e.g. shipping a new default role for a new business_type.

permissions.name: platform.rbac.role_definitions.update
permissions.description: Update i18n labels, business_type_slugs, min_tier, default_permissions.

permissions.name: platform.rbac.permissions.viewAny
permissions.description: List every permission across every Application.

permissions.name: platform.rbac.permissions.create
permissions.description: Create a NEW system permission string. Rare — usually happens via the auto-discovery loader reading #[ProvidesPermissions].

permissions.name: platform.rbac.permissions.update
permissions.description: Update permission metadata (description, module_slug, is_system flag).

permissions.name: platform.rbac.tenants.reseed_defaults
permissions.description: Trigger `rbac:seed-defaults --tenant=X --force` for a specific tenant. Support-driven recovery from broken default sets.
